extensionName.description: Extension name shown in browser UI

extensionDescription.message: Right-click to upload images/videos to Blombooru

tooltipSaveInvalid.message: Invalid server entry. Fix or remove before saving.

confirmRemoveServer.message: This will remove the server. Are you sure?

statusPermissionRequired.message: Browser permission required to test this address.

errorCouldNotReachServer.message: Could not reach the server. Check the address and try again.

errorAuthFailed.message: Authentication failed. Check your API key.

errorApiKeyInvalidFormat.message: Blombooru API keys start with "blom_". Copy the full key shown when it was created.

errorApiKeyUploadUnsupportedVersion.message: This Blombooru version ($1$) cannot upload with an API key. Upgrade to v1.40.0 or newer.

errorUnexpectedStatus.message: Server returned $1$. This may not be a Blombooru instance.

errorInvalidJson.message: Server response was not valid JSON.

errorNotBlombooruApi.message: Response does not look like a Blombooru API.

errorUploadAuthRequired.message: Upload failed: authentication required. Check the API key and ensure Blombooru is v1.40.0 or newer.

errorUploadHostPermission.message: Upload cancelled: allow access to your Blombooru server when prompted.

errorUploadMethodNotAllowed.message: Upload failed: method not allowed. Check your Blombooru base URL.
